## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run gen:check` (codegen committed)
- [ ] `npm run test:backend`
- [ ] `npm run test:react`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if UI-affecting)
- [ ] Manual smoke test on desktop (if Electron-affecting)
